title: Document Current Auth Flow and Design Cloudflare Worker-Based Auth
description:
Phase 1 of the Cloudflare Worker auth migration (Epic MBT-1260). Document the current authentication flow and design the new Cloudflare Worker-based architecture.

### Deliverables
- Architecture documentation of current auth flow
- Sequence diagrams for new Cloudflare Worker auth flows
- API endpoint documentation and routing rules
- Tenant directory structure and schema
- Proposed Cloudflare Worker-based design
acceptance_criteria: Current authentication flow is fully documented with sequence diagrams
New Cloudflare Worker-based auth flow is designed with routing rules
API endpoints are documented for the new flow
Tenant directory schema is defined for pooled vs dedicated tenants
implementation_notes: Waqar used Claude Code to generate the current authentication flow documentation and proposed Cloudflare Worker design. Documentation committed to a feature branch in GitHub: jira-1279-documentation-current-authentication-flow.
comment_summary: Waqar generated the current authentication flow documentation and proposed Cloudflare Worker design using Claude Code, committed to a GitHub feature branch.
